channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Morning Minute: Soldier Arrested for $400K Polymarket Insider Bet on Maduro Raid
item.description: Trump says the whole world's a casino. Tether made its biggest enforcement freeze ever. And SBF drops his new trial bid.

item.title: Metaplanet raises $50M in zero-interest bonds to buy more Bitcoin
item.description: Metaplanet raises $50 million through zero-interest bonds from EVO FUND to expand its Bitcoin treasury, extending its capital markets-driven accumulation strategy.

item.title: Aave Leads ‘DeFi United’ Push to Contain $292M KelpDAO Fallout
item.description: Aave's founder has pledged 5,000 ETH of his own money as a growing DeFi coalition races to contain the fallout from the KelpDAO exploit.

item.title: 🇨🇳 NEW: China has tightened its crypto crackdown, issuing new online marketing rules that again classify crypto promotion, issuance and trading as illegal financial activities. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5mQWJia2RwRjAwT2ZRNUdLR01jeW40bjM2NndkZjZYd3VRRlhUbGtqZ1RVSEpxOTVHeGprWFE5QlZpdDRNRkZ2WWZRU2FMZnBaQXVLR0Z5RzdyTTBBb1B2STczeUU?oc=5" target="_blank">🇨🇳 NEW: China has tightened i…

item.title: Bitcoin, dollar move in near-perfect opposition. It hasn't been this extreme in almost 4 years.
item.description: What you need to know for April 24, 2026

item.title: Bitcoin stalls below at $77,500 as volatility cools, traders unwind leverage
item.description: BTC holds a tight range as open interest drops, signaling cooling momentum, while altcoins show mixed performance and ZEC attracts fresh bullish interest.

item.title: Michael Saylor says the bitcoin winter is over. Some experts agree, with caveats.
item.description: Market analyst Mati Greenspan said bitcoin has not gone through a “winter,” rather a pullback within a broader bull market, adding the next leg up for bitcoin will be driven by nation-state adoption.

item.title: Trump Says World Becoming a ‘Casino’ as Soldier Charged Over Polymarket Maduro Bets
item.description: The U.S. president said that he “was never much in favor” of prediction markets, as the latest insider trading case highlighted risks.

item.title: India pushes e-rupee through welfare pilots as BRICS digital currency plan takes shape
item.description: Farmers and food programs anchor 10 pilots aimed at boosting usage, while New Delhi eyes BRICS CBDC link ahead of 2026 summit

item.title: U.S. government sits on $26.5 billion gain from Intel stake, as shares surge 22%
item.description: The surge in Intel shares, up more than 22% after earnings, has significantly boosted the value of the U.S. government’s position.

item.title: Bitcoin-holder Metaplanet raises $50 million to buy more BTC
item.description: Metaplanet has issued 8 billion yen, or about $50 million, in zero-interest bonds to fund additional bitcoin purchases.

item.title: White House confirms Trump to address memecoin gala on Saturday
item.description: US President Donald Trump will appear at an event for holders of the TRUMP memecoin after the White House previously said it wasn’t locked into his schedule.

item.title: US DOJ strike force 'restrains' $701M in crypto in ongoing scam crackdown
item.description: Besides freezing crypto, the strike force also seized a Telegram channel used to recruit unsuspecting job seekers and took down 503 fake crypto investment websites.

item.title: Morgan Stanley is positioning itself as the reserve manager for the stablecoin industry
item.description: The Wall Street giant has announced a fund build specifically for stablecoin issuers. Here is what it does and means for the market.

item.title: Morgan Stanley launches stablecoin offering through money market fund
item.description: Stablecoin issuers must invest a minimum of $10 million into Morgan Stanley’s money market fund, MSNXX, to access the stablecoin reserve offering.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs just pulled $2 billion in 8 days while short-term holders quietly started selling
item.description: Spot bitcoin ETFs logged their first 8-day inflow streak since October, but on-chain profit-taking is already running at 3x the rate that has marked every local top this year.

item.title: US vows to fight ‘industrial scale’ AI theft by Chinese firms
item.description: The White House’s office of technology policy said that foreign entities are using proxy accounts and jailbreaking techniques to distill capabilities from American AI models.

item.title: Jane Street asks US court to toss Terraform’s insider trading suit
item.description: Jane Street has filed to dismiss Terraform’s insider trading suit, arguing the reasons for Terra’s collapse have already been litigated.

item.title: Bitcoin rally is stalling as Japanese inflation adds to Iran war–driven market jitters
item.description: Crypto markets weaken amid rising Japan inflation, Iran war oil disruptions, and expectations of a hawkish Bank of Japan.

item.title: Crypto protocols pledge 43K ETH to restore rsETH backing
item.description: Mantle, EtherFi Foundation, Golem Foundation, Lido DAO, Ethena, LayerZero, Ink Foundation and Tyrdo have all made pledges to the “DeFi United” recovery effort.

item.title: Wisconsin joins prediction market fight, suing Kalshi, Coinbase, Polymarket, Robinhood and Crypto.com
item.description: The state's complaint highlights language used by prediction market platforms as language for gambling, not investing.

item.title: US soldier charged over $400K Polymarket bet on Maduro’s capture
item.description: US prosecutors alleged that Gannon Ken Van Dyke asked Polymarket to delete his account after profiting from trades tied to the military operation in Venezuela.

item.title: ⚡️ LATEST: Arthur Hayes thinks Ethereum will drop out of the top 3 cryptocurrencies by 2030, with AI-focused assets potentially taking its spot. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5GNkVMTm5YNDBVdDAzdUkydjhJRGw5cHZYYVR4bVRtV3VDbnp2SVpNdjlwN0NQQWFXSUNkNXRpUnFYaGd6aEt6SjVmZTRCM2dPS0JJbGV4OVl2ZmlGbWkyTjJfX3E?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ LATEST: Arthur Hayes thinks …

item.title: Critical Bitcoin trend change in works, but analysts say daily close above $80K required
item.description: Bitcoin’s rally above $79,000 may be a sign that the downtrend is ending, but a multi-day candle close above $80,000 would help strengthen the odds of a trend change holding.

item.title: The #KelpDAO hacker has now swapped all 75,701 $ETH ($175M) on Ethereum into $BTC through THORChain and other routes. 🚨 Mantle ( @Mantle_Official) has proposed providing 30,000 $ETH ($70M) to Aave as a loan. Lido( @LidoFinance) has also pro - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBlWWdLTmg4OTBfdk9WM21zYmtoUTNMcEg5b3ltY2hXR2UzU04xa2tnbXY1elREeWNMTUdyVlIxWnVzekVLak9rTjNXWjBsTTJ4U0daNzNibm1xR0Z2QmdiUXh3?oc=5" target="_blank">The #KelpDAO hacker has now swappe…

item.title: Altcoins have ‘30% to 60%’ upside if Bitcoin taps $86K: Analyst
item.description: MN Trading Capital founder Michael van de Poppe doesn’t expect Bitcoin to drop below $75,000 in the near term, even as Polymarket traders price in a different outcome.

item.title: The blockchain is a billboard. Your wallet address is the headline. Your balance is the caption. Sarge doesn't think you signed up for this. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBSemxEaGd5dndHVFFCU2RYQjAySzNZMVJFR2hURTE0di13cjJjWmhQYkZCQlpjbENnZFNJaVJTbHZNeUR3V1otdC00MDJJdG1RaVItT0FYSm5fc2tweElkX2pvMWpTQ3c?oc=5" target="_blank">The blockchain is a billboa…

item.title: US Soldier Charged for Alleged $400K Polymarket Insider Trading on Maduro Removal
item.description: Federal prosecutors say an Army soldier made over $400K betting on Venezuela-related outcomes on Polymarket using classified intelligence.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: U.S. arrests Army green beret for $400,000 Polymarket bets on Venezuela raid he was in
item.description: Master Sergeant Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly tried to conceal his bets about the raid on Venezuela that led to Nicolas Maduro's arrest.

item.title: Crypto-aligned Fellowship PAC bets big on Texas Senate race
item.description: The Fellowship PAC disclosed that it had spent $1.75 million in support of Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton, facing Senator John Cornyn in a May runoff.

item.title: Anthropic Beats OpenAI on Secondary Markets With $1 Trillion Implied Valuation
item.description: On Forge Global, Anthropic shares are hovering around $1 trillion while OpenAI trades at $880 billion — a reversal nobody saw coming three months ago.

item.title: Spot ETH ETF inflows hit 10-day streak: Will Ether rally to $3K next?
item.description: Inflows to the spot Ether ETFs topped $633 million over the past 10-days, but are the flows significant enough to trigger a rally to $3,000?

item.title: Global crypto adoption slumps amid macro pressures, Turkey defies downtrend
item.description: Retail crypto activity fell 11% in Q1 as macro pressures weighed on markets, though Turkey and emerging economies showed resilience, TRM Labs data shows.

item.title: Google Maps Lets Filmmakers Scout Movie Scenes Using AI and Street View Data
item.description: Google unveiled a new AI tool in Maps that lets filmmakers preview scenes in real-world locations ahead (or instead) of scouting trips.

item.title: Aave rallies DeFi partners to contain fallout from $292 million KelpDAO hack
item.description: Industry players are coordinating a recovery effort as the year's biggest crypto theft rattled Aave, with Lido and EtherFi being firsts to offer aid.

item.title: Meta Will Lay Off 8,000 Employees as AI Focus Intensifies
item.description: Social media giant Meta is redirecting resources toward AI as CEO Mark Zuckerberg predicts the tech will continue to revolutionize work.

item.title: Anchorage Digital adds Marinade-powered staking strategies for Solana clients
item.description: The integration with Marinade Finance lets clients earn yield via validator selection strategies while retaining custody and control within a single platform.

item.title: Microsoft-Backed Space and Time Launches AI App Builder on Base
item.description: The no-code platform aims to make building and deploying on-chain apps as simple as writing a prompt.

item.title: Circle Economist Proposes 50% Rate Ceiling to Snap Aave's USDC Liquidity Crisis
item.description: Some users pushed back via Aave’s governance forum, fearing the changes would fuel liquidations on the lending protocol.

item.title: Tether freezes $344M USDt stablecoins at US law enforcement request
item.description: The stablecoin issuer cited "activity tied to unlawful conduct” but no further explanation for the freezing of the dollar-pegged tokens held in two wallet addresses.

item.title: Bitcoin enters disbelief phase as USDC exchange reserves push above $7.5B
item.description: A negative Bitcoin funding rate and $7.5 billion in USDC reserves suggest traders may start positioning against the bearish trend. Will BTC price keep rising?

item.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.5: Faster, Smarter—And Pricier
item.description: OpenAI's newest model matches GPT-5.4's speed while outperforming it on nearly every benchmark. It's rolling out to paid ChatGPT users today.

item.title: US Treasury Sanctions Powerful Cambodian Politician Allegedly Tied to Crypto Scam Network
item.description: Kok An, a Cambodian senator, is accused of running a massive crypto crime operation through his many resorts and casinos.

item.title: Inside the KelpDAO Bridge Exploit: How ~$292 Million in rsETH Was Released Against a Non-Existent Burn
item.description: TL;DR On April 18, 2026, attackers linked to North Korea’s Lazarus Group stole ~$292 million (116,500 rsETH) from KelpDAO’s LayerZero… The post Inside the KelpDAO Bridge Exploit: How ~$292 Million in rsETH Was Released Against a Non-Existe…

item.title: MoonPay launches fiat-to-stablecoin virtual accounts in New York
item.description: MoonPay has expanded its virtual accounts product to New York, allowing businesses to convert fiat into stablecoins and settle funds without prefunding across jurisdictions.

item.title: Inside the $71 million freeze on Arbitrum that has the crypto world questioning what decentralization really means
item.description: The emergency response prevented stolen funds from moving, but sparked debate over governance, control and the limits of decentralization on Layer 2s.

item.title: OpenAI Says Its New ChatGPT for Doctors Outperforms Humans in Clinical Tasks
item.description: ChatGPT for Clinicians is designed to save doctors time, and OpenAI says it scored higher than human physicians—on the AI giant's own test.

item.title: Upwards moves can last longer than you generally expect. #Bitcoin collapsed from $100K+ to $60K in less than 2 months. Currently, there's a slow grind higher after a V-shaped recovery in the Nasdaq. I think this leg has enough room to continue to $86K, and - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFB0bWpreHlOY05od2ZpVWVuOUtuclFvMjk5amVQa0FUeHdDN3c0aElKY05NYk1uSlkyVTlaR3QwbVd3UGhVTUw0cU9FaUxlOTZlMXBRMXg3cE9IYnNTemNjYndPRQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Upwards moves can last longer th…

item.title: Tencent's New Hy3 AI Model Is the Most Efficient Chinese LLM No One's Talking About
item.description: Tencent just open-sourced Hy3 preview, a new model that punches above its weight on coding agents, reasoning, and search—built in under three months.

item.title: Crypto advocacy groups call action on market structure bill ‘critical‘
item.description: More than 120 entities associated with the crypto and blockchain industry signed onto a letter urging US Senators to move forward with a crypto market structure bill.

item.title: Fold Launches 'Bitcoin Bonus' Program for Employers Following Steak 'n Shake Debut
item.description: Publicly traded Bitcoin services firm Fold is rolling out a program to let companies grant employees bonuses in crypto.

item.title: Figure shares sink 9% as $1B lending milestone meets market volatility
item.description: FIGR stock retreated after a brief rally as shifting sentiment hits crypto-linked equities, even as analysts point to strong growth in the fintech's blockchain-based lending.

item.title: Ben Cowen: The Exact Date Bitcoin May Bottom in 2026 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9zV1N0bVVvX2xtY0lWMmE5M1d1SmNYQVJtWXNIX3RMcUU3ZWotWnFNUlE4UzZaOEdISzBJcHJ4ODJWWFU4d3BvUG82NWN1ZHJpWFVHejdoZ2Zzbnhzd0Zyc1NmSQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Ben Cowen: The Exact Date Bitcoi…

item.title: The market repriced DeFi in just 48 hours
item.description: Di Bartolomeo argues that last weekend the market achieved – in real time – a notable feat that no regulator, auditor or commentator has ever done.

item.title: Founder of Solana Token Launchpad Believe Arrested on Assault, Strangulation Charges
item.description: Benjamin Pasternak faces criminal charges following an investor class action lawsuit and accusations of breaching an OTC token deal.

item.title: White House Accuses China of 'Industrial-Scale' Theft From American AI Models
item.description: President Trump's administration says foreign actors are using jailbreaking techniques and fake accounts to extract American AI capabilities.

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried Withdraws Motion for New Trial, Denies Ghostwriting Allegations
item.description: The disgraced FTX founder's parents have reportedly pushed for a pardon from President Donald Trump behind closed doors.

item.title: Update on rsETH incident: rsETH reserves have been paused across Ethereum Core, Arbitrum, Base, Mantle, and Linea. This was done with the objective of recovering additional funds as the recovery plans progress. We will keep the community updated on t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWEFVX3lxTFB6ZFRGWkFMMXV4el80Mk1XYXJOUTlzY1lMdllLc2VTRWstTDNYZzFnbXkwcGpOWW40ZWRTT2R6ODBsM0djUFhjbUJNbjNZV2UtcUFDQ1owdjU?oc=5" target="_blank">Update on rsETH incident: rsETH reserves have b…

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: AI Agents Using Crypto
item.description: AI agents are executing transactions, forming “agentic finance.” Crypto is the financial backend for these autonomous systems. Learn use cases, risks, and what experts say.
